creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Boris Samorodov from comment #2)

1. Ugh, I hadn't even considered that the light_bundle patch hadn't taken care of every architecture's build path. =( Given that we use the ports tree to manage all of the dependencies anyways and nothing in here is architecture-specific, I think I'm just going to patch the build system to route all builds through the linux64 patch since i already know that works. It shouldn't have any effect elsewhere, but I'm test-building this on i386 and armv6 (the latter mostly for my own satisfaction) just to make sure.

2. Hmm, interesting, I thought I had a RUN_DEPENDS on bash at some point, but it looks like that might've disappeared. This will be fixed in the next iteration shortly.
